notes: Policy layers (highest precedence first): blocked_and_explicit_suppress (memory + policy) → required_skills (static memory) → session_profile_routing (beats stored preferences; does not beat memory suppress/block) → negative_preferences (avoid) → positive_preferences (prefer) → static_recommended_skills → optional_fallback_and_soft_signals
Session profile routing signals: 1 applicable entry from .brain/runtime/session-profile.json.
